# HELP DCGM_FI_DEV_GPU_UTIL GPU utilization (in %)
# TYPE DCGM_FI_DEV_GPU_UTIL gauge
DCGM_FI_DEV_GPU_UTIL{gpu="0",UUID="GPU-abc123",node="node-1",modelName="NVIDIA H100 80GB HBM3"} 75.5
DCGM_FI_DEV_GPU_UTIL{gpu="1",UUID="GPU-def456",node="node-1",modelName="NVIDIA H100 80GB HBM3"} 82.0
# HELP DCGM_FI_PROF_SM_ACTIVE The fraction of time at least one warp is active on a multiprocessor
# TYPE DCGM_FI_PROF_SM_ACTIVE gauge
DCGM_FI_PROF_SM_ACTIVE{gpu="0",UUID="GPU-abc123",node="node-1"} 0.72
DCGM_FI_PROF_SM_ACTIVE{gpu="1",UUID="GPU-def456",node="node-1"} 0.79
# HELP DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED Framebuffer memory used (in MiB)
# TYPE DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED gauge
DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED{gpu="0",UUID="GPU-abc123",node="node-1"} 40960
DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED{gpu="1",UUID="GPU-def456",node="node-1"} 51200

DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_FREE{gpu="1",UUID="GPU-def456",node="node-1"} 30720
# HELP DCGM_FI_PROF_DRAM_ACTIVE The fraction of cycles where data was sent to or received from device memory

DCGM_FI_PROF_DRAM_ACTIVE{gpu="1",UUID="GPU-def456",node="node-1"} 0.61

DCGM_FI_DEV_GPU_TEMP{gpu="1",UUID="GPU-def456",node="node-1"} 76
